name: Henry Henderson
nativeName: ヘンリー・ヘンダーソン
description: __Affiliation:__ Eden Academy __Occupation:__ History Teacher, Housemaster of Cecile Hall Henry is a mature and noble person, who places a high importance on "elegance". To him, elegance seems to be the way a person conducts themselves, and is not afraid to correct inelegant behavior in others.

name: Menchi
description: One of the two examiners that presided over the second stage of the Exam. Her exam topic was to prepare a piece of sushi for her to taste. If it met up to her stringent expectations, the candidate would pass.

name: Raito Sakamaki

Cordelia raised her son, Raito, in an extremely sick way; as it was the "norm" to have sex with him. name: Roxas
description: The youngest and newest member of the Organization, Roxas, was found in Twilight Town by Xemnas. He is also referred to as the "Key of Destiny". Roxas's original self is Sora. He is voiced by Jesse McCartney in the English version of Kingdom Hearts II and Koki Uchiyama in the Japanese version. When pre-release Kingdom Hearts II screenshots and video showed this character without an Organization coat, he was featured prominently, emphasizing his importance to the future game's plot. In battle, he

name: Sagiri Ameno
description: __Height:__ 163 cm (5'4") A ninja from the Chuuma Village. She hails from the Ameno house, a clan specializing in the art of demon slaying. She is dedicated to her duty as a ninja, spending time going on missions to destroy harmful supernatural creatures. As a result of her upbringing, she has a stern personality and is often flustered when someone compliments her appearance.

name: Saito Hiraga
description: __Height:__ 172 cm (5'8") Saito is a student from Tokyo, Japan. One day, his laptop got broken and he decided to repair it; however, learning of the expensive fee for repair, he does not continue the repair, thinking of applying for a part-time job. As he walks down the streets, a mysterious portal appears before him, which can be only seen by him. He touches it out of curiosity, but it sucks him up despite his attempts to break free from it. name: Seita
description: Seita is responsible, mature, and tough. Since his dad is away fighting in the war, he is responsible for all the jobs his father would normally take, including caring for his younger sister, Setsuko. Seita's main fault is his pride, which can cause him to make wrong decisions. ~!Seita's mother dies after a bombing raid on their town!~ ~!Seita's father assumed killed after Seita learns the entire Japanese fleet was destroyed, Seita and his sister become orphans!~ ~!Seita's sister dies of malnutr

name: Serufu Yua
description: A laid-back first year of high school who grew up in a relaxed family. She has a delusional habit and soon becomes empty, hitting a wall or falling on the road and she is constantly injured. Even if the shirt sticks out, or if she has a terrible sleep, she doesn't care about "Oh, well!". Her hobby is graffiti.

name: Sunako Kirishiki
description: A young girl who moves into the Kanemasa mansion atop the hill with her family. She has a rare genetic disorder known as SLE, which leads her to stay inside her home during the day and only come out at night. She and her family are fans of the essays and novels written by Seishin Muroi, and is the reason they moved to Sotoba. Sunako dislikes people calling her name with the honorific "chan". ~! Sunako was originally a beloved daughter of a well-off family. She was bitten by a vampire Western nob

name: Duanhe Yang
description: Yang Duanhe is the mysterious King of Qin’s Mountain Tribes, is the leader and spokesperson for the Confederation of different tribes that reside in Qin's mountain area. She is known in the mountain realms as the Lord of Death. After the Coalition War, she was also rewarded with the title of Da Shang Zhao of Qin.

name: Nyanta
description: __Race:__ Werecat __Class:__ Swashbuckler __Subclass:__ Chef Nyanta is an old friend of Shiroe, as he also used to be a member of the Debauchery Tea Party. He's the one who protected Serara while she was trapped in the city of Susukino. He considers himself a "gentleman"; his weapon of choice is the rapier which he can double-wield. He can cook meals that have actual taste due to his subclass.

name: Anna Kushina
description: __Height:__ 140 cm A quiet, doll-like girl who serves as HOMRA's unofficial mascot. Anna is very quiet and shy compared to her louder, more eccentric HOMRA members. In addition, she rarely expresses much emotion nor does she actively participate in the gang-like activities of HOMRA, due to her young age and status as the sole female in the group; however, she is not unwilling to tag along and cooperate if necessary. name: Himari Inuzuka
description: Yuu's best friend since junior high school. She is good at manipulating people to make them do things she wants, and she is an honor student at school and the daughter of a good family.

name: Inferno Cop
description: Inferno Cop is a messenger of justice who came from the depths of hell to protect people from the criminals of Jack Knife Edge Town.

name: Kiyomaro Takamine
description: __Height:__ 5'11" Kiyomaro is a genius junior high student (Middle school student in Japan) who doesn't have any friends because people around jealous of him being too smart. He is soon given Gash to care for by his father. Gash makes Kiyomaro believe in himself and together they fight other mamonos to become the King of Mamonos.

name: Olivia Servant
nativeName: オリヴィア・サーヴァント
description: __Race:__ Human+ Olivia is an S class adventurer who was arrested 200 years ago in a trap on the Unending Dungeon after defeating a monster in a room on the 2nd Floor. She was later found by Noir 200 years later, whom she chose to be her successor, and who she starts to instruct and advise. Olivia is energetic and powerful.

name: Bayonetta
description: Bayonetta is the eponymous main character and protagonist of the Bayonetta series. She is a coquettish and mysterious Umbra Witch who possesses remarkable talent for the bullet arts. After a 500 year slumber in a coffin submerged at the bottom of a lake and awakening without any memories apart from her status as a witch, Bayonetta fights to find the truth about her past.

name: Nine Forton
description: Nine is Melissa's shy butler and a werewolf. He was rescued from the streets by Melissa, making him really loyal to her.

name: Rei Asaka
description: Rei is a charming girl attending the second year at Seiran. Nanako meets her for the first time in the bus taking her and Tomoko to their first day in the new high school. Nanako is immediately impressed by her beauty, her confident attitude, and most of all by her "warm and deep" voice. name: Yugo Hachiken
description: The main character of Silver Spoon, he enrolls in Yezo High, an agricultural school, to get away from his parents. He is hard-working and intelligent, but he struggles in competing in grades with some individuals who have grown up in agricultural backgrounds, which affects his pride. He joins the equestrian (horses) club to become closer to Mikage Aki, who he has a crush on. Seeing those around him striving towards their goals, he acknowledges his own lack of a goal and tries to find one.
